e,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家\",\"title_id\":\"author\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7358092300846631961","book_info":{"abstract":"灵墟内，天地封禁。弃婴李初一，被一个善良老者抚养，幼年饱受他人白眼欺凌，郁不得志！机缘巧合下自蛮荒森林获得无上功法，融合青铜古殿，修为一路突飞猛进。且见他如何剑斩四方天骄，脚踏八荒凶兽，建立无上王朝，踏入帝主之位，打破这天地枷锁！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o25ad2fab59d6928c426e9d3ace09d331~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"踏雪落星痕","author_id":"","book_id":"7358092300846631961","book_name":"破墟灵主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0b810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":258,\"name\":\"传统玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258\u0026name=传统玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":452,\"name\":\"架空\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452\u0026name=架空\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7358311037684154905","read_count":"2","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"209505"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"84","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o25ad2fab59d6928c426e9d3ace09d331~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779176274\u0026x-signature=x931EQSYZEk7TwbkluFQLBp8d
